nodes.context: New York City street gang active in the late 19th century, based in the Gas House district of Manhattan, specializing in armed robbery and extortion.
New York City street gang that absorbed the Gas House Gang in 1910.

edges.evidence_quote: The gang continued to control the district for over two decades until it was eventually absorbed by the Five Points Gang in 1910.
edges.context: The Gas House Gang was absorbed by the Five Points Gang in 1910.
